# netbox_platform (Data Source)

Fetches a single platform from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single platform by ID.
data "netbox_platform" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "platform_name" {
  value = data.netbox_platform.example.name
}

output "platform_slug" {
  value = data.netbox_platform.example.slug
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the platform.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the platform.
- `manufacturer_id` (Number) The ID of the manufacturer associated with this platform.
- `name` (String) Name of the platform.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the platform.
